name: Bungaban Wind Farm

timeline.title: State Development approval granted
timeline.detail: 1.4 GW wind + 350 MW / 1,400 MWh battery. $3.9B. 25-year PPA with Rio Tinto.

timeline.title: COD estimate updated
timeline.detail: COD changed from 2030-03 to 2030-03-30 (source: AEMO Generation Information)

scheme_contracts.execution_notes: Windlab 'invited to enter into a CISA' 22 May 2026 per Infrastructure Pipeline — CISA execution date not publicly disclosed. Rio Tinto PPA signed Dec 2024 for Gladstone smelter/refinery power. RE describes Bungaban as 'expected to move to FID relatively quickly' but future-tense — no public FID confirmation. First power target 2028; construction 'on track to commence 2026' per Windlab. Status corrected from prior 'fid' to 'awarded' 2026-07-18 pending public FID announcement.

operational_notes: 1,150 MW wind + 1,400 MWh BESS. Rio Tinto PPA signed Dec 2024 for Gladstone smelter/refinery power (de-risking milestone — NOT FID). Windlab was 'invited to enter into a CISA' 22 May 2026 per Infrastructure Pipeline — CISA not yet executed. State approval Mar 2025; federal EPBC still progressing. First power target 2028; construction 'on track to commence 2026' per Windlab. Windlab is Squadron Energy / Andrew Forrest-backed.

timeline_events.title: CIS Tender 7 underwriting awarded (1150 MW + 1400 MWh)
timeline_events.detail: Windlab's Bungaban Wind Energy Project (QLD) wins CIS Tender 7 underwriting. Part of the 19-project / 7.8 GW package announced 2026-05-23.

sources.title: New projects to deliver 7.8 GW of clean energy (DCCEEW)
